title: rest mediterranean fromage-blanc bake
description: a salty, crumbly, one-pot mediterranean dish featuring fromage-blanc, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner. this recipe is kosher-friendly and suitable for vegetarians.
instructions: mix the fromage-blanc, rest, kosher salt, and black pepper in a bowl until well combined.
heat the olive oil in a 9x13 inch baking dish over medium heat.

add the chopped parsley, chopped dill, grated lemon zest, chopped cucumber, chopped red bell pepper, crumbled feta cheese, cooked rice, chopped kalamata olives, and chopped capers to the bowl and stir until well combined.
transfer the mixture to the baking dish and smooth the top.
bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the mixture is heated through.
remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
serve warm, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
reheat in the oven or on the stovetop as needed.
serve at room temperature or slightly warmed.
perfect for a quick weeknight dinner or a light lunch.
also great as a side dish or appetizer.
can be made ahead and refrigerated or frozen for later use.
easy to make and fun to customize with your favorite ingredients.
